name: IMPACT Silver Corp.
description: IMPACT Silver Corp. is a producing silver-zinc miner operating in Mexico, with four underground silver mines and one open-pit mine at its 211 km2 Zacualpan project in central Mexico feeding a central 500 tpd processing plant. The company also operates the Plomosas high-grade zinc mine in northern Mexico. Over 19 years of operations, IMPACT has produced more than 13.7 million ounces of silver with no long-term debt, making it a rare self-funded producer-explorer.
